tools.name: Apple Notes
tools.description: Read and write notes in Apple Notes via AppleScript. List folders and notes, get full note content, create, update, append, search, and delete notes. On first use, macOS will ask permission to control Notes — click Allow once.

tools.name: Apple Reminders
tools.description: Manage reminders in Apple Reminders via AppleScript. List reminder lists, create reminders with due dates and priorities, complete/uncomplete, search, and delete. On first use, macOS will ask permission to control Reminders — click Allow once.

tools.name: Bash / Shell
tools.description: Run shell commands and scripts on macOS. Capture stdout/stderr, open interactive Terminal windows, and automate system tasks.

tools.name: Google Chrome
tools.description: Control Chrome tabs and windows via JXA. Optionally enable CDP (--remote-debugging-port=9222) for JS execution, page source, and screenshots.

tools.name: Clipboard
tools.description: Read, write, transform, and manage the macOS system clipboard. Supports plain text, HTML, RTF, file paths, and clipboard history.

tools.name: Launcher
tools.description: Open apps, folders, URLs and reveal files in Finder using the macOS open command.

tools.name: Obsidian
tools.description: Read and write notes in your Obsidian vault. Search by content, create and update notes, manage folders, and navigate your vault structure.

tools.name: OpenAI
tools.description: Structured LLM calls (GPT-4o, gpt-4o-mini) and Whisper audio transcription. Both tools share a single API key.

tools.name: Safari
tools.description: Control Safari tabs and windows via AppleScript. Includes JS execution, page source and text via 'Allow JavaScript from Apple Events' (no extension or debug port needed).

tools.name: Voice Recorder
tools.description: Start and stop microphone recordings on macOS. Returns file paths for use with transcription tools. Uses AVFoundation via PyObjC — no Homebrew dependencies.

tools.name: VS Code
tools.description: Control VS Code windows — toggle sidebar/terminal/panels, run commands, create terminals, open folders. Requires the 'nicollasr.vscode-streamdeck' extension installed in VS Code.

tools.name: Window Management
tools.description: Move, resize and snap windows across screens. Get frontmost app, list open windows, snap to halves/quarters, and manage multiple displays.
